instructor.brief:
# Schoolhouse Intelligence Brief — Logistics Principles Paper Course - Cohort 26-1

_Anchored to NAVMC 3500.58._
_Schoolhouse: MCLOG (Marine Corps Logistics Operations Group), Camp Lejeune NC._

## PARA 1 — BLUF
Cohort of 3 on LOG-PRIN-26-1. Cohort competency map shows strength in **Doctrinal Knowledge (3.9/5)**, weakness in **Critical Thinking (2.8/5)**. 1 student(s) require instructor intervention before the Apply MCDP-4 Logistics Principles to a 72-hour MAGTF Sustainment Plan is due. Instructor effectiveness signal: **EFFECTIVE**.

## PARA 2 — TOP PERFORMER
**Capt Alvarez** (S01, Capt) — synthesis-level forum work, consistent 4+ rubric across all four competencies. Pull as a peer-coach for the intervention cohort.

## PARA 3 — STUDENTS AT RISK
- **GySgt Diaz** (S03, GySgt) — recommended action: 1:1 OPORD writing drill + re-issue MCDP-1 reading.

## PARA 4 — CURRICULUM EFFECTIVENESS
- Highest-landing: 'Apply MCDP-4 Logistics Principles to a 72-hour MAGTF Sustainment Plan' — rubric criterion C1 (Doctrinal grounding) is the most consistently scored.
- Lowest-landing: forum thread on centralized control — most posts stay at recall depth. Re-prompt to require a counter-argument and one historical AAR cite.

## PARA 5 — RECOMMENDED INSTRUCTOR MOVES
1. Re-prompt the centralized-control thread (counter-argument required).
2. Pair Capt Alvarez with at-risk students on the next Tactical Decision Game.
3. Quiet thinkers to surface:
   _(none in this cohort)_
4. T&R coverage on LOG-DIST-2001 → close-out by EOW.

## COMPETENCY MAP — COHORT
| Student | Critical Thinking | Communication | Doctrinal | Problem Solving |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Capt Alvarez | 4.3 | 4.1 | 4.5 | 4.2 |
| 1stLt Brennan | 2.5 | 2.8 | 3.2 | 2.9 |
| GySgt Diaz | 1.7 | 1.9 | 2.4 | 2.0 |

_UNCLASSIFIED // FOR OFFICIAL USE — Military Education Records governed by the Privacy Act of 1974 (5 U.S.C. § 552a) and DoDI 1322.35._

student.brief:
# Adaptive Study Plan — Logistics Principles Paper Course - Cohort 26-1

_Anchored to NAVMC 3500.58._

## BLUF
You are tracking competent on Doctrinal Knowledge but weak on Critical Thinking. Three drills below close that gap before Apply MCDP-4 Logistics Principles to a 72-hour MAGTF Sustainment Plan is due.

## Tonight (45 min)
- Re-read MCDP-1 Ch. 4 and write a 200-word counter-argument to your last forum post. Cite one historical AAR.
- Run egocentric drill **scn_05 (Hallway Cross)** — narrate your sequence aloud before acting.

## This Week (2 hr total)
- Pair with Capt Alvarez on the Tactical Decision Game. They are scoring 4.3 on Critical Thinking.
- Outline your Apply MCDP-4 Logistics Principles to a 72-hour MAGTF Sustainment Plan against the 5 rubric criteria — one paragraph each.

## Schoolhouse Read-back
- Your competency trend (6 wks): Critical Thinking +0.4, Communication +0.2, Doctrinal +0.5, Problem Solving +0.3.

_UNCLASSIFIED // FOR TRAINING USE — Military Education Records governed by the Privacy Act of 1974 (5 U.S.C. § 552a) and DoDI 1322.35._

co.brief:
# Schoolhouse Health Brief — MCLOG (Marine Corps Logistics Operations Group), Camp Lejeune NC

_Anchored to NAVMC 3500.58._

## BLUF
- Course **Logistics Principles Paper Course - Cohort 26-1** running with 3 students; instructor **MGySgt R. Vasquez**.
- Cohort competency: **GREEN on Doctrinal**, **AMBER on Critical Thinking**, **1 student(s) flagged for intervention**.
- Instructor effectiveness signal: **EFFECTIVE** (consistent rubric alignment, intervention recommendations precede grade slip by ~4 days).

## Curriculum Effectiveness
- Highest landing: written Apply MCDP-4 Logistics Principles to a 72-hour MAGTF Sustainment Plan (mean 86, spread 14).
- Lowest landing: forum thread 'When does centralized control hurt initiative?' — recall-level posts cluster at 33% of cohort.

## Recommended CO Moves
1. Authorize a 1:1 remediation block for GySgt Diaz.
2. Reissue MCDP-1 Ch. 4 reading with a counter-argument prompt — current prompt rewards agreement.
3. Cross-pollinate with sister schoolhouse cohort — Capt Alvarez can present to a peer cohort.

## Schoolhouse Risk
- T&R event coverage on LOG-DIST-2001 is at 80% — close-out by EOW.

_UNCLASSIFIED // FOR OFFICIAL USE — Military Education Records governed by the Privacy Act of 1974 (5 U.S.C. § 552a) and DoDI 1322.35._
